description:
The StaticMesh component is used to load a static mesh asset from the Uri specified in `URL`

Generally, you will not need to use this component directly, as it is created automatically when importing a new mesh, or when baking a Procedural Mesh using the Sync Method ``BakeMesh()``

fields.URL: The Uri pointing to the .meshx asset to be loaded
fields.Readable: Whether this component's data can be read via protoflux.

methods.RecalculateTangentsMikktspace: Recalcates mesh tangents which affect shading. This is Mikkspace which is defined by UnityEngine's definition.
methods.RecalculateBlendshapeTangentsMikktspace: Recalculate the normals of blendshape data in Mikktspace.
methods.ConvertToConvexHull: Converts the mesh to a convex hull.
methods.ConvertToPointCloud: Converts the mesh to a point cloud.
methods.ResaveMesh: Resaves the mesh recieved on the client to the cloud. can fix syncing issues with other users.
methods.GetBoneList: Creates a dialog that shows the bone list.
methods.GetBoneData: Creates a dialog that shows the bone data.
methods.ScaleUVs: Scales the UVs by the recieved size.

usage: Attach to a slot, provide a ``URL`` and insert into a SkinnedMeshRenderer or MeshRenderer. Don't forget the Material(s).
